---
title: "GaR analysis"
output:
  rmarkdown::pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
    number_sections: true
    includes:
            in_header: C:\\Users\\Misha\\Documents\GaR\\GaR-preamble.tex

vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{GaR analysis}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF_8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE, echo = FALSE, message = FALSE,warning = FALSE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```


```{r setup}

devtools::load_all()

library(GaRPackg)

```


```{r load_libraries}

library(cowplot)

library(gghighlight)

library(tidyselect)

library(tidyverse)

library(quantreg)

library(rlang)

```


```{r Import_data}

raw_data = list(osnat_list = import.osnat.data(),
                michael_list = import.michael.data())

raw_data$raw_df = full_join(raw_data$osnat_list$osnat_df,
                            raw_data$michael_list$michael_df,
                            by = "Date") %>% 
  arrange(Date)

```


```{r Set_parameters}

results = list()

parameters_list = list()

parameters_list$quantile_vec = c(0.05,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.95)

parameters_list$horizon_list = list(1,8,12)

parameters_list$drop_series = c("Vacancies_Rate","Telbor_1Y","STARTUP_FP",
                "Term_spread","Sovereigh_spread",
                "Interbank_spread","LT_real_rate_change",
                "TA125_Close","Indus_prod_ind","ILS_EURO",
                "breakeven_inflation_5_10_fwd")


```


```{r Process_data}


df = raw_data$raw_df %>% 
  select(Date,GDP_F, GDP_real, CA, Credit_to_non_fin_sector,
         HousePrice_Index) %>%
  rename(Credit = Credit_to_non_fin_sector, House = HousePrice_Index) %>% 
  mutate_at(.vars = vars(Credit,CA),
            .funs = list(GDP = ~. / GDP_F)) %>% 
  mutate_at(.vars = vars(House, GDP_real, Credit_GDP),
            .funs = list(ret = ~. / lag(.,12) - 1))






```


```{r plot_GDP_density}

ggplot(df %>% 
  select(Date, GDP_real_ret) %>% 
  filter(complete.cases(.)), aes(GDP_real_ret * 100)) + 
  geom_density() + 
  labs(title = "Unconditional density of cumulative GDP growth", y = "",
       x = "GDP 3 year growth (%)") + 
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

```


```{r quantile_reg}

qreq_list = lapply(parameters_list$horizon_list, function(temp_horizon){
  
  reg_df = df %>% 
  select(GDP_real, Credit_GDP_ret,House_ret, CA_GDP) %>% 
  mutate(GDP_real = log(GDP_real)) %>% 
  mutate(GDP_real = (lead(GDP_real,temp_horizon) - GDP_real) * 4 / 12) %>% 
  mutate(GDP_Lag = lag(GDP_real)) %>% 
  filter(complete.cases(.)) %>% 
  mutate_all(.funs = list(~scale(.)))
    

qreq = rq(formula("GDP_real ~ Credit_GDP_ret + House_ret + CA_GDP
                  + lag(GDP_real,1)"),
          tau = parameters_list$quantile_vec,data = reg_df)

return(qreq)
  
  
})

names(qreq_list) = parameters_list$horizon_list


coeffs_data = lapply(names(qreq_list), function(temp_name){
  
  temp_df = qreq_list[[temp_name]]$coefficients %>% 
    as.data.frame()
  
  temp_df %>% 
    rename_all(.funs = list(~str_remove(.,pattern = "tau= "))) %>% 
    mutate(Variable = rownames(.)) %>% 
    gather(key = Tau,value = GaR, -Variable) %>% 
    mutate(Horizon = temp_name)
  
  
}) %>% 
  bind_rows()

```


```{r plot_coeffs}

ggplot(coeffs_data %>% 
         filter(Tau == 0.05) %>% 
         filter(!Variable == "(Intercept)"), aes(x = Variable, y = GaR)) + 
  geom_col() + 
  facet_wrap(~Horizon,scales = "free") + 
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90))

```
